reviewer_stance: independent skeptical audit before submission packaging
verdict: accept-quality with minor (writing-only) clarifications; no new experiments required

items.label: LaTeX compiles clean (0 errors, no undefined refs/citations)

Headline numbers traced to durable on-board microbenchmark result file (MAPE 3.27%, worst 9.72%, roofline 47.56%, 104 configs across two dispatch kernels)
No coefficient fit to target latencies; stage coefficients come from standalone on-board operator microbenchmarks plus one single-row anchor per kernel (interpretable)

items.label: Every core claim (C1-C3) maps to durable evidence
items.evidence: paper/claim_evidence_map.json; required items A1-A4 + dsa-stagepred-grid-v2 resolved in evidence_ledger.json (on-board)

items.label: No operator/agent/worktree/route wording or implementation shorthand in main text
References are canonical/verifiable; no fabricated-citation risk
Scope and limitations stated honestly (single device; cross-arch as protocol not claim; worst-config disclosed)
